entry.title: South Africa's Ruined Synthetic Oil Giant

media:group.media:title: South Africa's Ruined Synthetic Oil Giant
media:group.media:description:
Citations
BARNARD, HELENA, and TRACY BROMFIELD. "The development and management of an intellectual property strategy in a developing country context: the case of Sasol." The economics of intellectual property in South Africa (2009): 84. Sparks, S. (2016). Between ‘artificial economics’ and the ‘discipline of the market’: Sasol from parastatal to privatisation. Journal of Southern African Studies, 42(4), 711-724. Verhoef, G. (2015). SASOL: From State-Owned Enterprise to Chemical Leader Management and Strategy, 1952-1980. Rivista di Politica Economica. Anastai, J. L. "SASOL, South Africa's Oil from Coal Story: Background for Environmental Assessment." (1980). Fischer Tropsch Schulz, Hans. "Short history and present trends of Fischer–Tropsch synthesis." Applied Catalysis A: General 186.1-2 (1999): 3-12. Dry, Mark E. "The Sasol route to chemicals and fuels." Studies in Surface Science and Catalysis. Vol. 36. Elsevier, 1988. 447-456. Dry, Mark E. "High quality diesel via the Fischer–Tropsch process–a review." Journal of Chemical Technology & Biotechnology: International Research in Process, Environmental & Clean Technology 77.1 (2002): 43-50. Woode, Nicholas. "Energy and the Apartheid State." BARNARD, HELENA, and TRACY BROMFIELD. "The development and management of an intellectual property strategy in a developing country context: the case of Sasol." The economics of intellectual property in South Africa (2009): 84. https://www.ft.com/content/a86aed2c-f970-11e9-98fd-4d6c20050229 Tlale, Peter. "Sanctions against apartheid." (No Title) (1964). Lake Charles https://www.financialmail.businessday.co.za/fm/features/cover-story/2020-11-26-sasol-when-will-the-lake-charles-nightmare-end/ https://www.financialmail.businessday.co.za/fm/money-and-investing/2019-05-30-how-sasol-got-lake-charles-so-wrong/ https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2019-10-28/sasol-names-new-ceo-after-u-s-plant-debacle-erodes-confidence?sref=LlJOmbkZ https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2018-05-10/fuel-giant-sasol-is-transforming-into-a-chemicals-powerhouse https://www.ft.com/content/89a3b38e-de20-11e0-9fb7-00144feabdc0 https://www.ogj.com/refining-processing/petrochemicals/article/14187441/sasol-fully-commissions-louisiana-petrochemical-complex https://www.1012industryreport.com/petrochemical/shareholder-concerns-grow-over-sasols-troubled-lake-charles-chemicals-project/ https://www.sasol.com/index.php/sasol-commences-front-end-engineering-and-design-feed-phase-integrated-gas-liquids https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2011-11-30/sasol-studies-ethane-cracker-plant-of-as-much-as-4-5-billion-in-lousiana https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2020-02-20/a-management-culture-of-fear-derailed-south-africa-s-sasol https://www.icis.com/subscriber/icb/2019/02/14/10319063/sasol-us-cracker-delay-raises-risks-for-h2-2019/#_=_ https://cfo.co.za/articles/paul-victor-reveals-how-sasol-is-addressing-the-cost-overrun-on-the-lake-charles-project/ https://siteselection.com/in-fact-its-a-gas/ Steynberg, Andre, and Mark Dry, editors. Fischer-Tropsch Technology. Elsevier, 2004. Andrews, Anthony, and Jeffrey Logan. Fischer-Tropsch Fuels from Coal, Natural Gas, and Biomass: Background and Policy. Congressional Research Service, 27 Mar. 2008. Report RL34133. Hilsenrath, Peter. “THE DEVELOPMENT OF SYNTHETIC FUELS IN SOUTH AFRICA.” The Journal of Energy and Development, vol. 14, no. 2, 1989, pp. 269–83. JSTOR, http://www.jstor.org/stable/24807938. Accessed 16 Dec. 2025. https://cen.acs.org/business/Sasols-chemical-leader-details-turnaround/103/web/2025/08 https://blogs.worldbank.org/en/developmenttalk/what-triggered-oil-price-plunge-2014-2016-and-why-it-failed-deliver-economic-impetus-eight-charts Investor Fact Sheet – Lake Charles Chemicals Project. Sasol Limited, 23 Aug. 2016. https://web.archive.org/web/20150611034307/http://www.moneyweb.co.za/news/companies-and-deals/sasol-ceo-to-step-down https://cen.acs.org/business/Sasols-chemical-leader-details-turnaround/103/web/2025/08

media:group.media:title: The Epochal Ultra-Supercritical Steam Turbine
media:group.media:description:
Errata: - I said in the video "The more efficient a turbine is the less coal we need to get the same number of megawatts". I think I should have said mega-watt hours or something. Energy rather than energy per time period. Thanks Franklin.
